reasoning: Both the LLM fidelity evaluation and programmatic detectors independently flagged redundant full-page images that duplicate the extracted text. Additionally, automated structural analysis identified 5 instances of incomplete, truncated alt text on images. With 3 confirmed major defects, the document requires human review to remove the redundant images and correct the alt-text accessibility issues.

The alt text of the first image explicitly describes 'A formal business letter regarding a revised Notice of Issuance of Mining Permit for Alamance', which matches the extracted text. concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=5 (truncated=5, placeholder=0, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.
The source document underlines the phrase 'within sixty (60) days' on the second page for emphasis. The output JSON fails to preserve this underline, resulting in a loss of visual emphasis.

concerns.description: Header/footer elements retained in output (1): North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality | Divisio
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=1. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

action_items: Remove redundant screenshot images that duplicate the extracted text.
Fix or remove the 5 instances of truncated alt text.
Restore the underline on the phrase 'within sixty (60) days'.
